description: You are a Facilities Administrator performing end-of-month billing reconciliation. Log in to OpenMaint (admin/admin) and process 6 work orders starting with 'WO-BILL-'. For each work order, identify the location from the description and append 'BILLING_CODE: [CODE]' to the 'Notes' field. Determine the [CODE] using the mapping in /home/ga/Desktop/billing_code_map.csv. Use the default code 'GEN-000' for locations not found in the mapping (e.g., Hallways, Exterior). If a work order description contains the word 'Warranty', do not modify the record.
